title: What music is this
wikitext:
[]: What music is this?             Quote Post by Dave » Wed Sep 01, 2004 11:42 pm For those who own the new platinum edition Eva dvd, can you please help me figure out the song playing when you go to the 'Scene Select' submenu. It sounds sort of like Thanatos, but I am quite sure it isn't. In fact it reminds of RahXephon... for some reason...

[]:             Quote Post by houtaru » Thu Sep 02, 2004 6:55 am The music played over the chapters menu is "Marking Time, Waiting for Death" from the first Eva soundtrack. The Extras menu is "Rei I" and the languages menu is "Rei II". The main menu is "Toyko-3". Only reason I know is I happen to have the first soundtrack.^^

[]: DAmn             Quote Post by Dark FireStar » Tue Sep 14, 2004 4:52 pm i need to get a job or two

[]: Re: DAmn             Quote Post by the_seventh_child » Wed Sep 15, 2004 5:25 am Dark FireStar wrote: i need to get a job or two

[]:             Quote Post by Dark FireStar » Wed Sep 15, 2004 6:09 pm so i can get some cash so i can GET the platnaume edition.

[]:             Quote Post by the_seventh_child » Thu Sep 16, 2004 1:58 pm Dark FireStar wrote: so i can get some cash so i can GET the platnaume edition.

[]:             Quote Post by Dark FireStar » Thu Sep 16, 2004 3:50 pm ~SEE! ~I just applyed for a job at the mall around here. Wish me luck!

[]:             Quote Post by advent_child » Thu Sep 16, 2004 3:56 pm Dark FireStar wrote: ~SEE! ~I just applyed for a job at the mall around here. Wish me luck!

[]:             Quote Post by sadsadshinji » Sat Sep 25, 2004 1:21 am a lot of the songs sound like one another...like there are 5 some songs which are basically fly me to the moon with different names...
